states.name: researched
states.description: Account one-pager written to drafts/<id>/research.md; fit_score computed
states.owner_action: cold-email queued if fit_score>=40 and state in {NC,SC,VA,GA,TN}

states.name: contacted
states.description: First outbound touch sent (email/call/LinkedIn); last_touch_date stamped

states.name: engaged
states.description: Prospect replied (any non-autoresponder); discovery scheduled or substantive questions asked

states.name: qualified
states.description: BANT cleared; fit_score >= 60; all four BANT dimensions non-unknown

states.name: quoted
states.description: Owner-delivered quote acknowledged; pallet_interest and est_volume_weekly locked
states.owner_action: owner follows up; agent only records transition

states.name: closed_won
states.description: PO or signed agreement received — TERMINAL

states.name: closed_lost
states.description: dq_reason populated — TERMINAL except reactivatable subset
states.owner_action: log reason; eligible for reactivation if dq_reason in reactivatable_set

forbidden_transitions.why: would quote an unresearched unqualified lead
reply without logged touch is data corruption
reply must be processed (→ engaged) before BANT
quote is a mandatory audit trail

notes: Transitions whitelist per spec 01 § 4.2 (+ C2 resolution: no demo_booked / proposal / disqualified).
stuck_thresholds_days align with spec 04's 8-touch / 21-day cadence (contacted=7, quoted=21).
Closed_lost → new only via reactivation skill; must change source=reactivation and clear dq_reason.
